title: SOLID, Code Smells, and Evidence-Driven Refactoring · Language Clinic: Oop Code Smells
summary: Evolve a growing circulation system without changing its verified external behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop code smells increment in a refactored maintainable service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use smells such as feature envy, shotgun surgery, long parameter lists, and god objects as investigation prompts.
Make high-level policy depend on stable roles while concrete infrastructure implements those boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
